string.text:
%c[ui_gray_1]A simple, well-worn pocket knife that's seen decades of use. The worn wooden handle fits comfortably in the palm, and the carbon steel blade, though slightly rusty, still holds a decent edge. This humble tool has probably cut more bread and whittled more wood than it's seen combat, but in a pinch, it'll do the job.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] reliable and simple design
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] lightweight and easy to carry
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] decent for everyday tasks
 %c[d_red] • %c[d_red] not ideal for serious combat
 %c[d_red] • %c[d_red] shows its age with reduced effectiveness
